title: Can I install an item-specific app across all Items at once?

posts.author: gmahima (Mahima G)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. I have an external app/plugin that opens up in an item window.
Do I have a way in which I can install it across all items in my workspace at once?
Currently, I am opening up an item window > clicking more > scroll down to installed apps> adding my app.
Are there any other ways I can add my app to the item?
Thanks in advance!
